title: The Science of Fictions
overview: Siman discover a foreign crew shooting a moon landing. He gets caught and his tongue is cut off. He goes through life in slow motion, imitating an astronaut in outer space, labeled as crazy.

trailers.title: THE SCIENCE OF FICTIONS -  Tayang di bioskop mulai 10 Desember 2020 (10 Nominasi Piala Citra!)
